title: SVNIT Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Centre Assistant Posts
description: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Centre Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the SVNIT Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
